name: Mrs. Fields Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a small bowl over hot (but not boiling) water, then let cool.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Ensure butter and eggs are at room temperature.
4. Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans.
5. Mix all ingredients together and bake for 35 minutes.
6. Let cool for 10 minutes.
